articles.description: The Reserve Bank of India maintained its key policy rate at 5.25% due to ongoing West Asia tensions, warning of supply chain disruptions impacting inflation and growth. Projections for GDP and inflation remain within targets, though geopolitical uncertainty poses downside risks. Markets reacted positively to the news.

articles.title: Iranians breathe a ‘ceasefire’ sigh of relief as all sides claim victory
articles.description: Celebration and scepticism coexist in Tehran as ceasefire offers reprieve despite doubts about its durability.

topStories.title: World reacts to ‘brutal’ Israeli attacks on Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 254 people and wounded 1,165 others, according to Lebanon’s Civil Defence.

topStories.title: Dragon does a Trump 'China made efforts to stop war'
topStories.description: China has stated it made "own efforts" to push for a ceasefire between the US and Iran, following reports of its pivotal role in brokering a two-week pause in hostilities. Foreign ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning detailed Beijing's diplomatic engagements aimed at deescalating regional tensions and achieving long-term stability.

topStories.title: Fed minutes show growing openness to rate hikes at March meeting
topStories.description: In recent meetings, Federal Reserve officials mulled the idea of increasing interest rates as inflation rates climbed beyond target thresholds, influenced in part by the intensifying U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran. Despite this, there is a strong expectation among many for rate cuts on the horizon.

topStories.title: White House says Trump’s ‘red line’ against Iran nuclear enrichment remains
topStories.description: Trump's spokesperson says Vice President JD Vance will lead US team for negotiations with Iran in Pakistan on Saturday.

topStories.title: JD Vance slams Zelenskyy’s comments about Hungary’s Orban
topStories.description: US vice president in Hungary calls Ukrainian leader's 'threatening' remarks 'completely scandalous'.

topStories.description: According to the White House, President Donald Trump expects the strait to remain open, and stressed that Tehran will be held accountable if it fails to ensure continued access for international shipping.

topStories.title: ‘A lot of work to do’ to reopen Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said more work is needed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Academicians appeal to President to intervene in Supreme Court textbook row

dailyNews.description: The House Oversight Committee had subpoenaed Bondi on 17 March to testify as part of an investigation into the DOJ's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell cases. Donald Trump fired Bondi as the US Attorney General Pam on April 2, after just over a year in office.

dailyNews.description: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.

dailyNews.description: Volkswagen subsidiary MOIA America still has a long and winding regulatory road before it can launch a commercial robotaxi service.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin scores Minnesota court win in Medicaid fraud crackdown

dailyNews.description: Critics slammed President Donald Trump's Iran threat as potential genocide, then mocked him for not following through using the viral TACO acronym.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump’s push to deport Abrego Garcia, rebukes DOJ for trying to ‘dictate’ court
dailyNews.description: A U.S. judge blocked Abrego Garcia's removal to Liberia, for now, further delaying a 13-month case that has spanned two continents and multiple federal court districts.

dailyNews.title: Stormy Daniels’ disgraced ex-lawyer and anti-Trump superstar Michael Avenatti moved to halfway house
dailyNews.description: Michael Avenatti has been moved from federal prison to a residential reentry program in California, per Bureau of Prisons records. He remains in custody.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Iran ceasefire rocked within hours amid reported missile, drone attacks
dailyNews.description: Trump announced a ceasefire with Iran, but reported drone attacks on Gulf states and Strait of Hormuz tensions signal the deal may already be strained.

dailyNews.title: Leavitt rebukes media outlets running with Iranian narratives on 10 demands
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt rebuked media outlets for reporting Iran's publicly released 10-point plan as acceptable to the US.

dailyNews.title: Sen Elissa Slotkin won't rule out 2028 presidential bid but says midterms come first for Democrats
dailyNews.description: Sen. Elissa Slotkin isn't ruling out a 2028 White House bid, saying she wouldn't say no forever if no other Democrat is on the right path forward.

dailyNews.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire amid Israeli attacks on Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: U.S. stocks rally, oil prices tumble after Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Investors cheered the announcement of a two-week ceasefire, which President Trump said is contingent on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Leavitt takes questions on Iran ceasefire, says Vance will lead negotiating team in Pakistan
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt took questions Wednesday about the ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran, shedding light on negotiations  between the two countries that will take place this weekend in Islamabad, Pakistan. Following the briefing, CBS News' Ed O'Keefe provided more insight.

dailyNews.title: Vance calls U.S.-Iran agreement a "fragile truce," work remains for lasting peace
dailyNews.description: President Trump has announced a ceasefire with Iran, but several questions remain about a long-term diplomatic solution to the fighting in the Middle East. CBS News' Natalie Brand and

dailyNews.title: Oil prices plunge after Trump announces ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Oil prices plunged on Wednesday after President Trump announced a 2-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran. CBS News business analyst Jill Schlesinger has more.
